records.m_Talk_ENG: Evacuate the villagers behind the barriers!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Evacuate the villagers behind the barriers!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Evacuate the villagers behind the barriers!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain! Some of the quick ones have already invaded the residential area!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain! Some of the quick ones have already invaded the residential area!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain! Some of the quick ones have already invaded the residential area!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you standing around for?! Get those kids to the town hall! GO!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you standing around for?! Get those kids to the town hall! GO!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you standing around for?! Get those kids to the town hall! GO!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for helping us, Miss Morgana!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for helping us, Miss Morgana!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for helping us, Miss Morgana!

records.m_Talk_ENG: AAARGH! There are monsters here too...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: AAARGH! There are monsters here too...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: AAARGH! There are monsters here too...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh. I can't see because of the building.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh. I can't see because of the building.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh. I can't see because of the building.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll hold them off here! You go find shelter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll hold them off here! You go find shelter!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll hold them off here! You go find shelter!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, you! Why did you follow me when you're not all better yet?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, you! Why did you follow me when you're not all better yet?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, you! Why did you follow me when you're not all better yet?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a paladin! I can't pretend not to notice when I hear people screaming!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a paladin! I can't pretend not to notice when I hear people screaming!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a paladin! I can't pretend not to notice when I hear people screaming!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! What even is a paladin?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! What even is a paladin?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! What even is a paladin?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are coming from the right! I'll take the opposite side!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are coming from the right! I'll take the opposite side!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are coming from the right! I'll take the opposite side!
